theme_and_archetype.description: A high-energy, command-center feel grounded in Deep Obsidian. UI uses Tactical Minimalism with Vibrant Neon Green as a kinetic trigger. High contrast, highly legible.

button.primary: Solid #00FF55 background, #050505 text, 0px border radius (tactical), bold uppercase text.

map_pin.style: Solid #00FF55 circle with inner black icon, surrounded by a subtle rgba(0,255,85,0.2) pulsing ring.

bottom_sheet.style: Background #121212, 16px top border radius, 1px top border #27272A. Includes a 4x32px grabber at the top (#27272A).

match_card.style: Background #1E1E1E, 8px border radius, left-aligned content. High contrast title, vibrant neon green date/time label. Avatar stack for joined players.

layout_strategy.general: Tactical Minimalism. Heavy use of negative space around metrics. Elements are mostly rectangular or slightly rounded (4px-8px).
layout_strategy.map: Map takes up 100% of the screen behind the UI (absolute positioning). Top nav and bottom sheet float over it using Glassmorphism surfaces.

hero_backgrounds.description: Cinematic wide-angle shot of a sleek, dark obsidian textured basketball court at night, subtle glowing neon green lines
Abstract deep space black and textured graphite background with a diagonal glowing neon green streak

instructions_to_main_agent: Share guidelines and write code strictly for .js files, NOT .tsx files (React Native JS).
Use pure React Native StyleSheet or NativeWind. Ensure all structural spacing uses the exact values provided in 'spacing'.
For Dark Mode map, use a custom MapStyle JSON to strip out POIs and turn roads/water into dark grays (#0F0F0F / #1A1A1A) with neon green accents for routes.
Do not use generic 'Inter' or system fonts for headings. Use 'Outfit' for all Headings (H1-H4) and 'Manrope' for body text. Ensure fonts are loaded properly.
Strictly apply `data-testid` to all interactive elements (e.g., `data-testid='login-button'`, `data-testid='match-card-1'`).
Use glassmorphism selectively for floating UI (e.g., Map Filter Chips) by applying translucent dark backgrounds with blurred backdrop.
Use 8px or 4px radii across all cards to maintain the 'Performance Pro' tactical feel. Do not use overly rounded UI (like 24px+).
For the Interactive Map, overlay swipeable bottom sheets to display match cards.
NEVER use placeholder images. Use only the provided image URLs in the assets section.
